title: Types should not derive from XmlDocument
messageFormat: Compose XmlDocument instead of deriving from it.
summary: XmlDocument is a large, non-virtual-friendly class that was never designed as a base type. A subclass inherits dozens of members it cannot meaningfully override and becomes tightly bound to an implementation that is expensive and hard to evolve.
Hold an XmlDocument as a private field and expose only the operations the type actually needs.
